violations.description: Food supplies. — --Food item obtained from unapproved source. -Farm Fresh Eggs are obtained from a neighbor; unsure if eggs are from a candled source.--Food item was prepared in private home. -Home canned apple pie filling for use in patries.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Thawing ground sausage and potatoes at room temperature. *Should be thawed under refrigeration or cold running water.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Observed dishes being washed and then sanitized. *Should be wash, rinse and then sanitize.

Demonstration of conformance with variance. — --License holder did not demonstrate conformance with approved variance or HACCP procedures. -Canned apple pie filling has not received 3 party processing/documentation.
